title: Etech's Better Maps
description: Changes the map inventory icons to make them more distinguishable.
body:
This resource pack changes the map inventory icons to make them more distinguishable from each other. It changes every vanilla explorer map texture including the 7 new ones added in 1.21.5, aka the Spring to Life drop :)



Note: The versions of this pack that were made before 1.21.5 require [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) in order to work. But as long as you're in 1.21.5 or higher and you're using version 3 of this pack then you won't need any mods for it.


Links:

[This pack on Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/etechs-better-maps-java)

[Bedrock version](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/etech-s-better-maps/) (Planet Minecraft)
